title: Arrest by master or person in charge
doc_html:
§871.  Arrest by master or person in charge

Any master or person in charge of any vessel upon which the offenses enumerated in R.S. 34:869 are committed, may arrest any person so offending and deliver him to the proper authorities for trial.
doc_text:
§871.  Arrest by master or person in charge
Any master or person in charge of any vessel upon which the offenses enumerated in R.S. 34:869 are committed, may arrest any person so offending and deliver him to the proper authorities for trial.
